name: Lavender Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, slowly heat milk to approximately 200°F.
2. Remove from heat and add lavender. Allow to steep for 15 minutes.
3. Strain the milk through cheesecloth while it is still warm.
4. Add crystallized ginger and sugar to the strained milk.
5. Place egg yolks in a small bowl, then add half of the mixture from the saucepan into the bowl to blend.
6. Stir the mixture with a spoon and pour back into the saucepan.
7. Return to low heat and cook until the mixture reaches approximately 200°F.
8. Add 2 cups cold heavy whipping cream and place in the refrigerator until well chilled.
9. Process in an ice cream machine according to manufacturer's instructions.
10. During the last few minutes of processing, sprinkle individual lavender flowers (removed from their heads) into the ice cream so they will be incorporated during churning.
Makes 1 quart.
